mapper.sql: id, rorder_no, order_type, customer_no, user_no, dept_No, rorder_item, model_no, quantity, dlv_entire, ppl_no, project_no, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, exp_dlv_type, dlv_date, address_no, wms_dlv_date, ContactPsn, delivery_dept_no, trade_companyId, price
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.order_temp
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_temp (id, rorder_no, order_type, customer_no, user_no, dept_No, rorder_item, model_no, quantity, dlv_entire, ppl_no, project_no, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, exp_dlv_type, dlv_date, address_no, wms_dlv_date, ContactPsn, delivery_dept_no, trade_companyId, price) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

rorder_no,

mapper.update:
update dbo.order_temp
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
ppl_no = #{record.pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{record.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

exp_dlv_type = #{record.expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER},

address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wms_dlv_date = #{record.wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE},
ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_dept_no = #{record.deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update dbo.order_temp set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR}, ppl_no = #{record.pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_no = #{record.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_dlv_type = #{record.expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wms_dlv_date = #{record.wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE}, ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_dept_no = #{record.deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update dbo.order_temp
rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_No = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

dlv_entire = #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
ppl_no = #{pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_dlv_type = #{expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dlv_date = #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

wms_dlv_date = #{wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE},

delivery_dept_no = #{deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.order_temp set rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_No = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dlv_entire = #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR}, ppl_no = #{pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_no = #{projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales_info_no = #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_dlv_type = #{expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dlv_date = #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, address_no = #{addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wms_dlv_date = #{wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE}, ContactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_dept_no = #{deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_companyId = #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
